seoMetaTitle: Power Integrations Solutions | Reference Designs & Applications | LiTong
seoMetaDescription: Power Integrations application solutions including AC-DC power supplies, LED lighting systems, motor drives, and gate drive solutions. Complete BOM and design support.

faqs.question: What application solutions does Power Integrations offer?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations offers comprehensive solutions for various applications: 1) AC-DC Power Supplies - High-efficiency adapters, chargers, and industrial power supplies using InnoSwitch, LinkSwitch, and TOPSwitch families. 2) LED Lighting - Complete driver solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial lighting with excellent dimming performance. 3) Motor Drives - BLDC motor control solutions for appliances and industrial applications using BridgeSwitch. 4) Gate Drive - Isolated gate driver solutions for IGBT and SiC MOSFET applications in motor drives and inverters.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution pages to find complete reference designs with BOM, schematics, and design files for your application.

faqs.question: How do I get started with a Power Integrations solution?
faqs.answer: Getting started with Power Integrations solutions involves: 1) Identify your application requirements - power level, input/output specifications, efficiency targets, 2) Select appropriate solution from our portfolio based on your needs, 3) Download reference design materials including schematic, BOM, and PCB layout, 4) Use PI Expert software to customize the design for your specifications, 5) Order evaluation board for prototyping and testing, 6) Contact our FAE team for design review and optimization. We provide comprehensive support from concept to production.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with our reference designs and use PI Expert software for customization. Contact our FAE team for design support.

solutions.name: High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution
solutions.description: Complete 35W high-efficiency power adapter solution using InnoSwitch3-CP with >92% efficiency and <30mW standby power. Meets DOE Level VI and CoC Tier 2 requirements.
solutions.longDescription: This comprehensive power adapter solution leverages Power Integrations' InnoSwitch3-CP family to deliver exceptional efficiency and compact size for consumer electronics applications. The design achieves >92% efficiency across the load range and <30mW no-load input power, exceeding DOE Level VI and CoC Tier 2 requirements. The integrated FluxLink feedback technology eliminates the optocoupler, improving reliability and reducing component count. The solution includes comprehensive protection features and excellent EMI performance, making it ideal for high-volume production.

coreAdvantages.title: Global Compliance
coreAdvantages.description: Meets DOE Level VI and CoC Tier 2

customerCases.challenge: Design compact 35W USB-C PD charger with high efficiency and low standby power
customerCases.solution: Used INN3675C with InnoSwitch3-CP for high integration and efficiency
customerCases.results: Achieved 93% peak efficiency, <25mW standby power, 40% smaller than previous design

faeInsights.title: Design Considerations for High-Efficiency Adapters
faeInsights.content: When designing high-efficiency adapters with InnoSwitch3, key considerations include: 1) Transformer design - use PI Expert for optimized specifications, 2) Synchronous rectification - select SR FET with low RDS(on) and fast switching, 3) EMI filtering - compact common-mode choke for conducted EMI, 4) Thermal management - adequate copper area for heat dissipation, 5) USB PD controller - integrate for fast charging protocols. The InnoSwitch3's integrated protection features simplify safety compliance.
faeInsights.insight: When designing high-efficiency adapters with InnoSwitch3, key considerations include: 1) Transformer...
faeInsights.logic: This solution was selected based on efficiency requirements, cost considerations, and reliability needs.
keyTakeaways: Compact size enables high power density
commonPitfalls: Inadequate thermal design can reduce reliability
Poor layout can cause EMI issues
bestPractices: Use PI Expert for optimized design
Verify thermal performance under max load

faqs.question: What is the typical efficiency of the High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution?
faqs.answer: The High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution achieves typical efficiency of >92% at 230V AC under normal operating conditions. The high efficiency reduces thermal dissipation and improves reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed efficiency curves and thermal design guidance.

faqs.question: What protection features are included in the High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution?
faqs.answer: The High-Efficiency Power Adapter Solution includes comprehensive protection features including overvoltage protection (OVP), overcurrent protection (OCP), overtemperature protection (OTP), and short-circuit protection. These protections ensure safe operation under abnormal conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: All protection features are integrated and require no additional external components.

solutions.name: Commercial LED Lighting Driver Solution
solutions.description: Complete 25W commercial LED driver solution using LinkSwitch-PH with >0.95 power factor, <15% THD, and 0-10V/PWM dimming for intelligent lighting systems.
solutions.longDescription: This commercial LED lighting solution utilizes Power Integrations' LinkSwitch-PH family to deliver high-performance lighting with excellent power quality. The single-stage design achieves >0.95 power factor and <15% THD, meeting IEC 61000-3-2 Class C requirements. The solution supports both 0-10V analog and PWM dimming interfaces, making it compatible with various lighting control systems. With >90% efficiency and comprehensive protection features, this solution is ideal for commercial and industrial lighting applications.

customerCases.challenge: Design 25W LED driver with high PF, low THD, and 0-10V dimming for commercial buildings
customerCases.solution: Used LNK418LG with LinkSwitch-PH for single-stage high-PF design
customerCases.results: Achieved 0.96 PF, 12% THD, smooth 1-100% dimming, 30% cost reduction vs two-stage design

faeInsights.title: Designing High-PF LED Drivers with LinkSwitch-PH
faeInsights.content: Key design considerations for LinkSwitch-PH LED drivers: 1) Inductor selection - critical for CRM operation and PF performance, 2) Input capacitor - balance between PF and ripple, 3) Dimming circuit - proper isolation and filtering for noise immunity, 4) Thermal design - adequate heatsinking for high ambient temperatures, 5) EMI compliance - proper filtering for conducted emissions. The single-stage design significantly reduces BOM cost while maintaining excellent power quality.
